subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Thy letter of 22 May 1919 hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بملکوت الله نامه ای که بتاریخ ۲۲ مای ۱۹۱۹ ارسال نموده بودی رسید از
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @equality of men and women, @transcending the material condition, @universal peace; world unity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @harmony of science and religion
